title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
